scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n BACKEND,WEB -c cyan,magenta "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend start"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n BACKEND,WEB,CCTV -c cyan,magenta,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend start" "backend\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn cctv_service:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8002 --reload --app-dir backend"
